rationale: meeting_key is required for calendar joins
session_key is the primary join key for all session tables
session_key and driver_number required for driver-level joins
Lap grain requires session, driver, and lap number
Pit rows require session and driver
Weather rows must link to a session
Position updates require session and driver
Race control messages must link to a session
Final classification requires session and driver
Optional endpoint; heuristic may use sessions/drivers in Gold
